hero.title: Valentine Pomodoro
hero.tagline: A Pomodoro timer built with love
hero.subtitle: Stay focused. Take breaks. Feel loved.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for productive, heartfelt focus sessions

items.title: Drift-Free Timer
items.desc: Timestamp-based engine stays accurate even when the app is backgrounded. No lost seconds.

items.title: Love Notes
items.desc: Personalized messages appear after each focus session to keep you motivated and smiling.

items.title: Stats & Streaks
items.desc: Track daily goals, view 7-day bar charts, and maintain your hard-earned focus streaks.

items.title: Dark Mode
items.desc: Full system-aware dark theme with warm red and lavender accents, easy on the eyes.

items.title: 100% Private
items.desc: No servers, no tracking, no accounts. All data stays on your device in AsyncStorage.

items.title: Fully Customizable
items.desc: Adjust timer durations, haptics, reminders, notification sounds, and more to fit your flow.

screenshots.title: App Screens
screenshots.subtitle: A beautiful, focused experience on every screen

tech.title: Under the Hood
tech.subtitle: Built with modern mobile technologies
decisionItems: Timestamp-based timer — immune to JS setInterval drift during backgrounding
Idempotency tracking — prevents double-counting completed sessions
Ad queue management — non-overlapping overlays for love notes, ads, and popups
Midnight attribution — sessions started before midnight count for the correct day

privacySection.title: Your Privacy Matters
privacySection.desc: Valentine Pomodoro collects zero data. Everything stays on your device — your focus sessions, your love notes, your streaks. Always.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Valentine Pomodoro is a 100% local application. We do not collect, transmit, or store any personal data on external servers.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: We do not collect any personal information. All app data — including timer settings, statistics, love notes, and preferences — is stored locally on your device using AsyncStorage and never leaves your device.

sections.title: Notifications
sections.content: The app may request permission to send local push notifications (e.g., when a focus session ends or as a daily reminder). These notifications are generated entirely on your device. No notification data is sent to any server.

sections.title: Advertising
sections.content: The app uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. Google may collect certain information as described in their privacy policy. Ads are displayed according to Google's policies and may be personalized based on your device settings.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.content: We do not use any analytics services. We have no insight into how you use the app.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.content: The only third-party service integrated is Google AdMob for advertisements. Please refer to Google's privacy policy for information on how they handle data.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: This app does not knowingly collect information from children under 13. The app contains no functionality that targets or collects data from children.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at the app's support page on the App Store or Google Play.
